name: Black Bean Soup with Jalapenos
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dried crushed red chile, seeds included
2 tablespoons Bacon fat or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the beans with water and soak overnight, or quick soak them.
2. Sauté the onion and garlic in the bacon fat until soft.
3. Combine all ingredients except tequila and sour cream in a large pot. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 hours or until beans are soft.
4. Remove ham hock and shred meat.
5. Divide soup into two parts. Puree half of it and return to the remaining soup. Add shredded meat and simmer for 15 minutes or until thickened to desired consistency.
6. Remove from heat, stir in tequila, garnish with sour cream, and serve.
Serving Suggestions: Serve as a lunch entree with warmed flour tortillas and a citrus salad.
